CustomField.formula: "Name: "+ Name + BR() +" "+ "Type: "+ RecordType.Name + BR() +" "+ "Status: "+ TEXT(Status__c) + BR() +" "+ "Requester: "+ Requester__r.FirstName+" "+Requester__r.LastName+ BR() +" "+ "Recipient: "+ Recipient__r.FirstName+" "+Recipient__r.LastName+ BR() +" "+ "Owner Name: "+ Owner:User.FirstName+" "+Owner:User.LastName+ BR()
CustomField.label: SYS full name
